title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: OpenAI reportedly finalizing $100B deal at more than $850B valuation

items.title: This AI Tool Will Tell You to Stop Slacking Off
items.description: Fomi watches you work, then scolds you when your attention wanders. It’s helpful, but there are privacy issues to consider.

items.title: Bowers & Wilkins Px7 S3 Review: Stronger Build, Sweeter Sound
items.description: Bowers & Wilkins’ latest Px7 headphones keep sound and style at the forefront, with brilliant results.

items.title: Reload wants to give your AI agents a shared memory
items.description: Reload announces a $2.275 million raise in a round led by Anthemis and the launch of its first AI employee, Epic.

items.title: Current is a new RSS reader that’s more like a river than an inbox
items.description: Current introduces a stress-free, totally reimagined RSS news reading app as a one-time paid download.

items.title: OpenAI taps Tata for 100MW AI data center capacity in India, eyes 1GW
items.description: OpenAI also plans to expand its presence in India with new offices in Mumbai and Bengaluru later this year.

items.title: Bug in student admissions website exposed children’s personal information

items.title: OpenAI deepens India push with Pine Labs fintech partnership
items.description: OpenAI moves beyond ChatGPT in India with a Pine Labs deal targeting enterprise payments and AI-driven commerce.
